name: Luna | Her Xmas Gift
description:
Luna | Her Xmas Gift
In this scenario, you are in debt: permanently and VERY deeply.

But not all is lost! A "kind", rich and influential businessman, a friend of a friend of yours, found out about your problems and offered you a deal: you will be friends with his daughter and be her errand boy, entertaining her in every possible way.

Well, you didn't have many options, so being a friend to a young girl might not be so bad, right?

And the only thing they told you was that she is into computer games...

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Now that Janitor is fixed, I'm back! Happy holidays to everyone, both past and coming! It's time for me to release a holiday bot. Don't hurt lonely Luna, okay? Love you, sunshines.

I may be a little late with Christmas, but I couldn't make a bot while Janitor is sick, please understand and forgive me~
creator: PavPav
